query: heavy fog mist obscured figure barely visible silhouette
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/fog_silhouette — anti_aesthetic — figures lost in mist, dissolved silhouettes, monochrome haze

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of two figures standing close together in the center of an expansive grassy field. Behind them, fog obscures clusters of trees and faint structures in the middle distance. The sky and upper portion of the frame blend seamlessly into the misty background. Tall grasses and low vegetation cover the terrain, and the overall scene is enveloped in atmospheric haze.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A washed-out monochrome image rendered in muted, desaturated gray tones with flat, directionless lighting that eliminates shadows and collapses spatial depth. Two small figures stand isolated in an expansive field enveloped by heavy fog, while distant trees and structures dissolve into obscured, textureless layers, creating a bleak, melancholic atmosphere of solitude and quiet unease.
